author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text: IPFS Desktop is looking fantastic! Thank you so much for all the care you, @hacdias, and  team have put into it, it such a joy to use it. I also love the "easter egg" of enabling npm-on-ipfs just with one checkbox ✅ 👌🏽
content.html: IPFS Desktop is looking fantastic! Thank you so much for all the care you, @hacdias, and team have put into it, it such a joy to use it. I also love the "easter egg" of enabling npm-on-ipfs just with one checkbox ✅ 👌🏽

author.bio: Studying Computer Engineering at @istecnico. Digging into the decentralized web at @ProtocolLabs. #opensource advocate.
author.name: Henrique Dias

content.text: Here's a blog post telling you everything about what's new on IPFS Desktop 0.9! Have any ideas for the future of it? We're open to any feedback! @IPFSbot https://blog.ipfs.io/2019-09-19-ipfs-desktop-0-9/
